native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Crystal structure of M-Calpain. Entity description: M-CALPAIN. Organism: Rattus norvegicus. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. V71 shard: V71C_BETA_BARREL_PROPELLER_REPEAT_SOLENOID_ENRICHED. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V71 E66 metadata context marks: assembly_context membrane_context_strong oligomer_context partner_copy_context topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E66 words are allowed; candidate E67 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates explicit transmembrane/topology-provider context
public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context

v71_context_policy.context_derivation: V71 E66 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E66-known words are allowed; candidate E67 words are withheld from prediction context so V71 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates explicit transmembrane/topology-provider context
